text.title: rag-eval-test-set-generation Output Contract
text.summary: JSON schema for one rag-eval-test-set-generation output, with valid and invalid examples.

example.code: { "query_id": "q-001", "query": "How do I rotate JWT refresh tokens?", "query_type": "factoid", "relevant_chunk_ids": ["auth-guide.md#c-007"], "expected_answer": "Issue a new refresh + access pair; revoke the old refresh.", "source": "real", "human_checked": true }
example.note: Valid: typed query, labeled chunks, real source, human-checked.
Invalid: missing query_id, query_type, source, human_checked; empty relevant_chunk_ids.

text.reference: Validates an output file against this schema.
